description: Row 5 appears to duplicate row 4 with normalized description and same date, payer, amount, currency, participants, and split type.
detection_logic: Normalize description by lowercasing/removing punctuation; compare business fingerprint.
recommended_action: Show row 4 and row 5 side by side; approve one, reject one, or keep both with reason.

description: Amount contains comma thousands separator: 1,200.
recommended_action: Parse only after user approves normalization from 1,200 to 1200.

description: Payer priya differs from canonical Priya by case.
detection_logic: Case-insensitive match exists but exact match fails.
recommended_action: Map to Priya after approval; optionally create approved alias.

description: INR amount 899.995 has more than two decimal places.
detection_logic: Currency INR supports 2 decimal places; value has 3.
recommended_action: Require correction or rejection.

description: Payer Priya S is not an exact user name.
detection_logic: Exact user match fails; fuzzy match suggests Priya.
recommended_action: User must approve alias mapping to Priya or reject row.

description: Split type unequal is not canonical but split details are exact amounts summing to total.
detection_logic: split_type not in canonical enum; exact split details parse and sum to 1500.
recommended_action: Map to exact after approval.

description: paid_by is blank.
recommended_action: Require payer selection or reject row.

description: Description and notes indicate Rohan paid Aisha back.
detection_logic: Keywords: paid back, settlement; split type blank; one payee in split_with.
recommended_action: Convert to settlement after approval: Rohan pays Aisha INR 5000.

description: Percentages total 110%, not 100%.
recommended_action: Require corrected percentages or reject row.

description: 01/03/2026 can mean 1 Mar or 3 Jan depending locale.
detection_logic: Date format is not ISO and day/month are both <= 12.
recommended_action: Require file-level date format approval.

description: 03/03/2026 is ambiguous.
recommended_action: Require file-level date format approval.

description: 05/03/2026 is ambiguous.
recommended_action: Require file-level date format approval.

description: 08/03/2026 is ambiguous.
recommended_action: Require date format approval.

description: USD expense cannot be imported into INR group without an approved exchange rate.
detection_logic: currency != group.base_currency and no exchange-rate evidence in row.
recommended_action: Provide/approve USD-INR rate for transaction date.

description: 09/03/2026 is ambiguous.
recommended_action: Approve interpreted date before selecting exchange rate.

description: USD expense requires exchange rate.
recommended_action: Approve USD-INR rate for transaction date.

description: 10/03/2026 is ambiguous.
recommended_action: Approve interpreted date.

description: Split type share should map to canonical shares.
detection_logic: Non-canonical split_type with parseable numeric shares.
recommended_action: Map to shares after approval.

description: 10/03/2026 is ambiguous.
recommended_action: Approve interpreted date.

description: Dev's friend Kabir is not one of the known users.
detection_logic: Participant name has no exact, case-insensitive, or approved alias match.
recommended_action: Create user and temporary membership, map to existing user, or reject row.

description: USD expense requires exchange rate.
recommended_action: Approve USD-INR rate.

description: 11/03/2026 is ambiguous.
recommended_action: Approve interpreted date.

description: Row 23 may duplicate row 24 but has different payer and amount.
detection_logic: Same date, similar merchant text, same participants, close amount.
recommended_action: Review both rows; keep one or both with reason.

description: Row note says Aisha also logged this and hers may be wrong.
recommended_action: Review against row 23.

description: Amount -30 cannot be imported as normal expense.
recommended_action: Treat as refund/adjustment with explicit policy or reject.

description: Negative USD refund still requires exchange-rate policy if imported as adjustment.
recommended_action: Approve refund handling and exchange rate.

description: Mar 14 has no year.
detection_logic: Parser cannot determine full transaction date without external context.
recommended_action: Require user to select full date.

description: Payer rohan has lowercase and trailing whitespace.
recommended_action: Map to Rohan after approval.

description: Currency is blank.
recommended_action: Require currency selection or reject row.

description: Amount contains trailing whitespace: 1450 .
recommended_action: Preserve raw value; parse normalized amount only with audit metadata.

description: Zero amount likely represents correction placeholder.
recommended_action: Reject or import as no-op adjustment only with reason.

description: Percentages total 110%, not 100%.
recommended_action: Require corrected percentages or reject.

description: Notes imply Meera moved out after this expense.
recommended_action: Create or confirm Meera left_at membership date.

description: Notes explicitly say the date may be April 5 or May 4.
recommended_action: User must choose exact date before import.

description: Meera appears in split on 2026-04-02 after likely leaving 2026-03-29.
recommended_action: Remove Meera from split or adjust membership with approval.

description: Sam paid Aisha deposit share; this is a payment, not shared spending.
detection_logic: Keywords: deposit, paid Aisha; split_with only Aisha.
recommended_action: Convert to settlement or deposit transaction after approval.

description: Sam paid before assumed join date 2026-04-15.
recommended_action: Confirm Sam join date or reject/convert with explanation.

description: Sam included on 2026-04-10 before assumed join date.
recommended_action: Confirm earlier join date or remove/reject row.

description: Sam included on 2026-04-12 before assumed join date.
recommended_action: Confirm earlier join date or remove Sam from split.

description: split_type says equal, but split_details contains shares.
detection_logic: Equal split has non-empty share-style split details.
recommended_action: Since all shares are 1, import as equal after approval or canonicalize to shares.
